sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, angle Float64, value Nullable(Float64));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, angle, value) VALUES (1, 0, NULL), (2, 1.5707963, 2.0), (3, -1.5707963, 3.5), (4, NULL, 0.5);
SELECT id, tanh(angle) AS tanh_angle, value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, tanh(value / NULLIF(angle, 0)) AS ratio_tanh FROM test_table WHERE angle IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, tanh(angle) * 2 AS scaled_tanh FROM test_table HAVING scaled_tanh > 0;
SELECT id, angle, value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL ORDER BY tanh(angle) DESC;
CREATE TABLE secondary_table (id Int32, multiplier Float64);
INSERT INTO secondary_table (id, multiplier) VALUES (1, 3.14), (2, 1.0), (3, NULL);
SELECT t.id, tanh(t.angle) / s.multiplier AS result FROM test_table t JOIN secondary_table s ON t.id = s.id WHERE s.multiplier IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, value, tanh(angle) AS tanh_angle FROM test_table WHERE angle IN (SELECT multiplier FROM secondary_table WHERE multiplier IS NOT NULL);
SELECT *, (tanh(angle) + value) AS computed_value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT SUM(tanh(angle)) AS total_tanh FROM test_table GROUP BY id;
SELECT id, angle, (SELECT avg(tanh(value)) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL) AS avg_tanh FROM test_table;
SELECT id, tanh(angle) AS tanh_value FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT DISTINCT id FROM test_table WHERE angle IS NOT NULL);
ALTER TABLE test_table ADD COLUMN new_column Float64;
INSERT INTO test_table (id, angle, value, new_column) VALUES (5, 1.0, 4.5, 0.5);
